mapper.sql: CASE WHEN c.name IN ('黑龙江', '吉林', '辽宁', '蒙东') THEN 1 WHEN c.name IN ('陕西', '甘肃', '新疆', '宁夏', '青海') THEN 2 WHEN c.name IN ('山东', '北方', '河北', '天津', '北京') THEN 3 WHEN c.name IN ('河南', '湖北', '湖南', '江西', '四川', '重庆') THEN 4 WHEN c.name IN ('上海', '浙江', '江苏', '安徽', '福建') THEN 5 WHEN c.name IN ('广东', '云南', '广西', '贵州', '海南') THEN 6 WHEN c.name IN ('雅江') THEN 7 WHEN c.name IN ('新能源') THEN 8 ELSE NULL END

CASE WHEN c.name IN ('黑龙江', '吉林', '辽宁', '蒙东') THEN '东北' WHEN c.name IN ('陕西', '甘肃', '新疆', '宁夏', '青海') THEN '西北' WHEN c.name IN ('山东', '北方', '河北', '天津', '北京') THEN '华北' WHEN c.name IN ('河南', '湖北', '湖南', '江西', '四川', '重庆') THEN '华中' WHEN c.name IN ('上海', '浙江', '江苏', '安徽', '福建') THEN '华东' WHEN c.name IN ('广东', '云南', '广西', '贵州', '海南') THEN '南方' WHEN c.name IN ('雅江') THEN '西南' WHEN c.name IN ('新能源') THEN '新能源' ELSE NULL END
mapper.select: SELECT MAX(t.date) FROM spot_transactions t WHERE t.date IS NOT NULL AND ( t.spot_price IS NOT NULL OR t.chng_spot_price IS NOT NULL OR t.gen_amount IS NOT NULL OR t.longterm_amount IS NOT NULL OR t.longterm_price IS NOT NULL )

SELECT t.date AS priceDate, c.id AS companyId, c.name AS companyName, AS regionId, COALESCE( AVG(CASE WHEN t.gen_type_id = 1 THEN t.spot_price END), NULL ) AS coalSpotAvgPrice, COALESCE( AVG(CASE WHEN t.gen_type_id = 3 THEN t.spot_price END), NULL ) AS windSpotAvgPrice FROM spot_transactions t JOIN companies c ON c.id = t.company_id WHERE t.date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY t.date, c.id, c.name ORDER BY t.date, c.id

SELECT d.priceDate, d.marketAvgPrice, COALESCE( SUM(CASE WHEN t.gen_type_id = 1 THEN t.gen_amount * t.chng_spot_price ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN t.gen_type_id = 1 THEN t.gen_amount ELSE 0 END), 0), 0 ) AS coalChngPrice, COALESCE( SUM(CASE WHEN t.gen_type_id = 3 THEN t.gen_amount * t.chng_spot_price ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN t.gen_type_id = 3 THEN t.gen_amount ELSE 0 END), 0), 0 ) AS windChngPrice, COALESCE( SUM(CASE WHEN t.gen_type_id = 2 THEN t.gen_amount * t.chng_spot_price ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN t.gen_type_id = 2 THEN t.gen_amount ELSE 0 END), 0), 0 ) AS solarChngPrice FROM ( SELECT cd.priceDate, AVG( CASE WHEN cd.companyName IN ('天津', '北京', '雅江', '新能源') THEN NULL WHEN cd.coalSpotAvgPrice IS NOT NULL THEN cd.coalSpotAvgPrice ELSE cd.windSpotAvgPrice END ) AS marketAvgPrice FROM ( SELECT t.date AS priceDate, c.name AS companyName, AVG(CASE WHEN t.gen_type_id = 1 THEN t.spot_price END) AS coalSpotAvgPrice, AVG(CASE WHEN t.gen_type_id = 3 THEN t.spot_price END) AS windSpotAvgPrice FROM spot_transactions t JOIN companies c ON c.id = t.company_id WHERE t.date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY t.date, c.id, c.name ) cd GROUP BY cd.priceDate ) d JOIN spot_transactions t ON t.date = d.priceDate WHERE t.date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY d.priceDate, d.marketAvgPrice ORDER BY d.priceDate

SELECT cd.priceDate, cd.companyName, CASE WHEN cd.coalSpotAvgPrice IS NOT NULL THEN cd.coalSpotAvgPrice ELSE cd.windSpotAvgPrice END AS avgSpotPrice FROM ( SELECT t.date AS priceDate, c.name AS companyName, c.id AS companyId, AVG(CASE WHEN t.gen_type_id = 1 THEN t.spot_price END) AS coalSpotAvgPrice, AVG(CASE WHEN t.gen_type_id = 3 THEN t.spot_price END) AS windSpotAvgPrice FROM spot_transactions t JOIN companies c ON c.id = t.company_id WHERE t.date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND ( (#{regionId} = 4 AND c.region_id IN (4, 7)) OR (#{regionId} != 4 AND c.region_id = #{regionId}) ) GROUP BY t.date, c.id, c.name ) cd WHERE cd.coalSpotAvgPrice IS NOT NULL OR cd.windSpotAvgPrice IS NOT NULL ORDER BY cd.priceDate, cd.companyName

SELECT '年度' AS period, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN t.gen_type_id = 1 THEN t.chng_transaction_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS coalAmount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN t.gen_type_id = 3 THEN t.chng_transaction_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS windAmount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN t.gen_type_id = 2 THEN t.chng_transaction_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS solarAmount, COALESCE( SUM(CASE WHEN t.gen_type_id = 1 THEN t.chng_transaction_amount * t.chng_avg_price ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN t.gen_type_id = 1 THEN t.chng_transaction_amount ELSE 0 END), 0), 0 ) AS coalPrice, COALESCE( SUM(CASE WHEN t.gen_type_id = 3 THEN t.chng_transaction_amount * t.chng_avg_price ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN t.gen_type_id = 3 THEN t.chng_transaction_amount ELSE 0 END), 0), 0 ) AS windPrice, COALESCE( SUM(CASE WHEN t.gen_type_id = 2 THEN t.chng_transaction_amount * t.chng_avg_price ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN t.gen_type_id = 2 THEN t.chng_transaction_amount ELSE 0 END), 0), 0 ) AS solarPrice FROM longterm_transactions t WHERE t.transaction_period_id = 1 AND t.contract_start_date <= #{contractEndDate} AND t.contract_end_date >= #{contractStartDate} AND t.transaction_type_id IN (1, 3) AND t.gen_type_id IN (1, 2, 3)

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(t.contract_start_date, '%Y-%m') AS period, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN t.gen_type_id = 1 THEN t.chng_transaction_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS coalAmount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN t.gen_type_id = 3 THEN t.chng_transaction_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS windAmount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN t.gen_type_id = 2 THEN t.chng_transaction_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS solarAmount, COALESCE( SUM(CASE WHEN t.gen_type_id = 1 THEN t.chng_transaction_amount * t.chng_avg_price ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN t.gen_type_id = 1 THEN t.chng_transaction_amount ELSE 0 END), 0), 0 ) AS coalPrice, COALESCE( SUM(CASE WHEN t.gen_type_id = 3 THEN t.chng_transaction_amount * t.chng_avg_price ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN t.gen_type_id = 3 THEN t.chng_transaction_amount ELSE 0 END), 0), 0 ) AS windPrice, COALESCE( SUM(CASE WHEN t.gen_type_id = 2 THEN t.chng_transaction_amount * t.chng_avg_price ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN t.gen_type_id = 2 THEN t.chng_transaction_amount ELSE 0 END), 0), 0 ) AS solarPrice FROM longterm_transactions t WHERE t.transaction_period_id IN (4, 5) AND t.contract_start_date BETWEEN #{contractStartDate} AND #{contractEndDate} AND t.transaction_type_id IN (1, 3) AND t.gen_type_id IN (1, 2, 3) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(t.contract_start_date, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY DATE_FORMAT(t.contract_start_date, '%Y-%m')
